arts.ttl: Sunday's Eredivisie predictions including Ajax vs. AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Eredivisie fixtures, including Ajax vs. AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: DANNY MURPHY: I'm baffled why Thomas Tuchel has recalled Jordan Henderson to the England squad - he's got fans' backs up already
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: I listened to Thomas Tuchel explain his reasons for giving Jordan Henderson an England recall but it still makes no sense. It's utterly baffling to me.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Jordan Henderson in Thomas Tuchel’s first England squad
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly, Dan Burn, Jarell Quansah selected No place for Grealish, Gibbs-White or Gallagher Thomas Tuchel has named Marcus Rashford in his first England squad, bringing the Aston Villa forward in from the international wilderness to complete a stunning turnaround in his fortunes. There is also a surprise return for Jordan Henderson, who is at Ajax and last played for England in November 2023, and Tuchel has given first call-ups to Dan Burn and Myles Lewis-Skelly. Jarell Quansah, Reece James and Kyle Walker are also included along with Rashford’s Villa teammates Morgan Rogers and Ezri Konsa. Continue reading...
